# CredentialSession.ErrorCode.internalError

**Case**

The framework encountered an internal error.

## Declaration

```swift
case internalError
```

## Miscellaneous error codes

- **CredentialSession.ErrorCode.invalidInput**: One or more parameters is invalid.
